payload.title: Forced-explicit fallible arithmetic on boundary integers
payload.description:
Agents write a+b, len*n on user-derived sizes; debug panics, release silently wraps. Lower bare ops on flagged integer types to a checked form, or require an explicit .checked_/.saturating_/.wrapping_ choice.

Honest caveat: Clippy DETECTS this (arithmetic_side_effects, restriction) — detection is commodity. The moat is that Trust can LOWER to a checked form or force the choice as a typed decision, which a linter can only nag about. Eval-gated: build only if a run shows agents shipping silent overflow.
